From the grocery aisle

Shop smarter.
Know what fits your goal.

Scan up to 5 products, pick your goal, and Bitalyze tells you exactly which one wins — normalized per equal serving size.

1

Name your comparison

Tell Bitalyze what you're comparing — milk, yogurt, protein bars.

2

Point at each label. Bitalyze reads them automatically.

3

Set your goal

Weight loss, high protein, low sugar, muscle gain — pick what matters.

4

Get the verdict

One clear winner, with a full breakdown of why it won.

To your kitchen

Cook with real macros.
Log per component.

Build recipes from real ingredients. Log by component — pasta, sauce, toppings separately. Have leftovers? Log just the portion you ate, not the whole thing. More accurate, less guesswork.

Your Personal Pantry

Save once.
Log forever.

Build your pantry with your go-to foods — from meals you cook to snacks you always grab. Tap any item, enter grams, and Bitalyze auto-computes the macros.

Add from 3 sources

Scan a nutrition label, search via AI, or enter values manually. Every ingredient saved to your pantry.

Tap to log instantly

See your pantry as a photo grid. Tap any food — enter how many grams you ate. Done.

Use in recipes too

Pantry items are available as ingredients when building cookbook recipes — so your macros stay accurate.

To sharing with the world

Share what you eat.
Inspire others.

Every meal you log can become a shareable card — real food, real macros, real progress. The community feeds off each other's wins.

AI Coaching

Meet your Bitalyze Buddy.

An AI coach that knows your logs, your goals, and your vibe. Ask anything — get real answers based on your actual data.

🐱
Pudong
Serious · Calm · Disciplined

Direct and no-fluff. Best for people who want clear advice without coddling.

🐈
Nala
Cute · Sweet · Supportive

Makes every step feel good — even the small ones.

🐕
Gatsby
Elegant · Refined · Chef-like

Talks about food like a chef — clean phrasing, premium framing.

🐶
Coco
Playful · Chill · Fun

Makes hitting goals feel fun. A coach that feels like a friend.

Gatsby · Elegant, refined, chef-like
Why am I not losing weight?
Let me look at your snapshot. You're eating close to your target — which is good — but your fiber intake is very low today at 1g. Low fiber causes water retention and reduces satiety. I'd suggest a high-fiber, low-calorie addition tonight — Fresh Strawberries at 60 kcal would be ideal.
Progress Tab

See your journey unfold.

Weekly calorie cycling, macro averages, BMI, body fat %, and a weight journal — all in one clear view.

Weekly calorie cycling

See which days you were over, under, or on target — with weekly totals at a glance.

Macro averages

This week, last week, 1 month, 6 months — switch any time to see your trend.

BMI + Body fat %

WHO Asian-Pacific BMI cutoffs. Body fat estimated using US-Navy method from your measurements.

FAQ

Questions?
We've got answers.

Yes — Bitalyze is free to download and use on both iOS and Android. Core features like food logging, the pantry, and progress tracking are available for free.
Point your camera at any food — Bitalyze's AI identifies what it is and estimates calories, protein, fats, carbs, and fiber. You can then refine the ingredients or adjust the portion size before logging.
Smart Compare lets you scan the nutrition labels of up to 5 products, set your nutrition goal (like high protein or low calorie), and Bitalyze compares them at equal serving sizes — then tells you exactly which product fits your goal best, and why.
The Pantry is your personal food library. Save any food — from meals you cook regularly to store-bought snacks — and log them later with a single tap. Just enter how many grams you ate, and Bitalyze auto-computes the macros.
Yes! You can publish any recipe from your cookbook to the Community Feed. Other users can browse, save, and log your recipe directly. You can also generate shareable macro cards from your logged meals.
Bitalyze Buddy is your AI nutrition coach — available in 4 personalities: Pudong (serious), Nala (supportive), Gatsby (chef-like), and Coco (fun). Your Buddy reads your actual logs and goals to give personalized guidance, not generic tips.
Yes — Bitalyze is available on both iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play). Your data syncs across devices automatically.
Accuracy depends on the logging method. Barcode scanning and nutrition label scanning pull data directly from the product label — these are the most accurate. AI Scan and Describe Meal use AI estimation, which you can refine by adjusting ingredients and portions.

today.
